prompt: Use image0 as the exact first frame and preserve its portrait composition, camera angle, subject identity, seated side-profile pose, clothing, lighting, and office background. The first frame shows an East Asian man sitting in a black ergonomic mesh office chair in a bright modern open-plan office, shown from the side in profile. He is looking toward the computer desk on the right side of the frame rather than at the camera. He has short black hair, rectangular black-rimmed glasses, light facial stubble, and wears a beige short-sleeved Puma t-shirt. His body remains relaxed in the chair, with his arms resting low near the chair armrest and desk area. Around him are computer desks, a large monitor, an open laptop, a keyboard, a phone on the desk, glass office partitions, overhead strip lights, other office chairs, a red jacket draped on a chair, green plants, and a hanging sign reading '海外电商部' in the background. In the video, the man first stays seated in the same side-profile pose and continues looking toward the computer area. After a brief pause, he smoothly turns his head and gaze toward the camera, followed by a slight natural rotation of his upper body so he can make eye contact with the viewer. Once he is looking at the camera, he raises his right hand and waves hello in a friendly, casual greeting. He holds the wave briefly, then gently lowers his hand while still facing the camera. Keep the camera static, preserve the same portrait framing, and maintain stable facial identity, glasses, beige Puma t-shirt, black mesh chair, desk, monitor, laptop, keyboard, overhead lights, hanging sign, and office spatial consistency throughout the motion.
